name: Columbus Marketing Analytics Meetup
description: Monthly Columbus-area meetup for marketing analysts, data-driven marketers, and analytics professionals. Hosted at rotating venues in Columbus, OH.

name: Ohio MBA Info Sessions Network
description: Graduate school MBA program information sessions and networking events for prospective students across Ohio.

name: Columbus Women in Tech & Analytics
description: Professional development and networking events for women working in tech, data, and analytics roles in Columbus, OH.

name: Short North Arts & Events
description: Cultural events, gallery openings, food and wine events, and community gatherings in Columbus's Short North neighborhood.

name: Columbus Running Collective
description: Group runs, fun runs, and fitness events around Columbus parks, greenways, and neighborhoods including Alum Creek.

name: Columbus Farmers Markets & Food Events
description: Farmers markets, food festivals, pop-up dinners, and culinary events across Columbus and Westerville, OH.

name: Columbus Museum of Art & Culture
description: Events hosted by or affiliated with the Columbus Museum of Art and Columbus's broader arts and cultural community.

name: Columbus Data & Technology Professionals
description: Meetups, workshops, and networking events for data scientists, engineers, and product analysts in Columbus.

name: Columbus Young Professionals Network
description: Leadership development, career networking, and community impact events for Columbus professionals under 40.

name: Fisher College of Business - Ohio State University
description: Events, info sessions, and alumni gatherings hosted by or affiliated with the OSU Fisher College of Business.

name: Capital University Graduate Programs
description: Graduate admissions events, info sessions, and orientation programs for Capital University's MBA and graduate programs.

name: Columbus Wellness & Mindfulness Collective
description: Yoga in the park, meditation sessions, healthy cooking demos, and wellness community events in Columbus.

name: Columbus Reads - Community Book Events
description: Author readings, book club meetups, and literary events at Columbus bookstores, libraries, and community spaces.

name: Columbus Half & Full Marathon Events
description: Official events affiliated with Columbus Marathon Weekend including training runs, expos, and charity fundraisers.

name: Westerville Area Chamber of Commerce
description: Business networking, community events, and professional development programming for Westerville-area businesses and professionals.

name: Columbus Comedy & Live Entertainment
description: Stand-up comedy shows, improv nights, and live entertainment events at Columbus comedy clubs and venues.

name: Columbus Startup & Entrepreneurship Network
description: Pitch nights, startup networking, and entrepreneurship events hosted across Columbus innovation hubs and coworking spaces.

name: Central Ohio Trail Alliance
description: Trail advocacy, volunteer trail maintenance days, and guided hikes along central Ohio's greenway and park trail systems.

name: Columbus Diversity in Tech
description: Inclusive tech community events, mentorship programs, and career development resources for underrepresented professionals in Columbus's tech sector.

name: Columbus Wine & Social
description: Wine tastings, happy hours, and social events at Columbus wine bars, restaurants, and vineyards in the greater Columbus area.
